    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    S

    scene - Static variable in class application.SceneHandler
    Shared scene instance whose root is swapped during navigation.
    Scene2 - Class in component.scene2
    Main battle scene that hosts gameplay, HUD, timer, and end-game presentation.
    Scene2() - Constructor for class component.scene2.Scene2
    Creates and initializes the battle scene, HUD nodes, players, and input/game loop hooks.
    SceneHandler - Class in application
    Utility class that owns a single JavaFX Scene and handles root swapping.
    SceneHandler() - Constructor for class application.SceneHandler
    Prevents instantiation of this utility class.
    selectCharacter(CharacterPane) - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Updates highlighted character card so only one card is selected at a time.
    selectedPane - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Currently highlighted character tile, or null if none selected.
    Selection - Class in logic.gameLogic
    Shared static holder for both players' selected characters between scenes.
    Selection() - Constructor for class logic.gameLogic.Selection
     
    selectState - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Selection state machine: player 1 selection, player 2 selection, then done.
    SelectState - Enum Class in logic.gameLogic
    Selection flow states for character pick scene.
    SelectState() - Constructor for enum class logic.gameLogic.SelectState
     
    setAtk(int) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets attack with non-negative clamp.
    setAttackRange(int) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets attack range with non-negative clamp.
    setAttackSpeed(float) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets attack speed with non-negative clamp.
    setAttackState(AttackState) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets attack state.
    setBuff(int) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets skill buff amount.
    setCharacter(int) - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Assigns represented character by index.
    setCharacter(Character) - Method in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Sets character model.
    setCooldownProgress(double) - Method in class component.scene2.SkillBar
    Updates the cooldown progress shown by the yellow fill.
    setCurrentAmmo(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Sets current ammo.
    setCurrentHp(int) - Method in class component.scene2.HealthBar
    Connect the player's HP to the HealthBar.
    setDef(int) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets defense with non-negative clamp.
    setDirectionX(float) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Sets X direction component.
    setDirectionY(float) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Sets Y direction component.
    setFRAME_DURATION(long) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets animation frame duration in nanoseconds.
    setFRAME_DURATION(long) - Method in interface logic.interfaces.AttackAnimation
    Sets frame duration in nanoseconds.
    setFrameIndex(int) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets current animation frame index.
    setHasKnockback(boolean) - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Sets knockback behavior.
    setHp(int) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets current HP clamped to range [0, maxHp].
    setImageBackground() - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Applies the background image for this screen using cover behavior.
    setImageBackground() - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Applies the scene background image using cover-style sizing.
    setImageBackground(Image) - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Applies an image background sized to this pane's preferred size.
    setLifeStealMultiplier(double) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Sets life-steal multiplier.
    setMaxAmmo(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Sets maximum ammo capacity.
    setMaxHp(int) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets maximum HP cap.
    setMaxHp(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Sets cached max HP.
    setName(int) - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Sets represented character name from character list index.
    setName(String) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets character name.
    setOrigin(int) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets original stat snapshot used by buff reset.
    setOriginAttackRange(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Sets original attack range.
    setOriginLifeStealMultiplier(double) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Sets baseline life-steal multiplier used for reset.
    setPlayer_1_Character(Character) - Static method in class logic.gameLogic.Selection
    Sets player 1 selected character.
    setPlayer_2_Character(Character) - Static method in class logic.gameLogic.Selection
    Sets player 2 selected character.
    setPlayer1(String) - Method in class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Sets player 1 selected name in the status text.
    setPlayer2(String) - Method in class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Sets player 2 selected name in the status text.
    setSelected(boolean) - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Toggles selected visual state for this card.
    setSkillState(SkillState) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets skill state.
    setState(PlayerState) - Method in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Sets current player state.
    setTotalFrames(int) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets total number of animation frames.
    setTotalFrames(int) - Method in interface logic.interfaces.AttackAnimation
    Sets total frame count used by animation.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Barista
    Barista currently does not use frame-based weapon animation.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Not used for Exorcist projectile attacks.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Loads Vampire attack animation frames.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Hammer
    Loads Hammer attack animation frames.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Katana
    Loads Katana attack animation frames.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Pyro
    Loads Pyro attack frame resources.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Not used for Archer projectile attacks.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Not used for Bubble projectile attacks.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
    Not used for Mage projectile attacks.
    setupAttackFrame(int) - Method in interface logic.interfaces.AttackAnimation
    Prepares attack frame resources.
    setupControls(Scene) - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Registers keyboard input handlers and forwards events to both player logic controllers.
    setWeaponSprite(String) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Sets weapon sprite image by resource path.
    sfxVolume - Static variable in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Global SFX volume in range [0.0, 1.0].
    SHOOT_DELAY - Variable in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Minimum delay between shots in nanoseconds.
    shootDelay - Variable in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Minimum delay between shots in nanoseconds.
    showBuffText(String) - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Plays temporary buff message animation above the controlled character.
    showFloatingText(Player, int, Color, String) - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Shows a temporary floating label above a target (damage/heal indicator).
    showVictoryOverlay(Player) - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Builds and animates the final victory/draw overlay.
    skill() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Activates the character special skill, applies buff text, and starts cooldown flow.
    SKILL - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.PlayerState
    Active skill usage state.
    SKILL_BAR_VERTICAL_GAP - Static variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Vertical spacing between health and skill bars.
    SKILL_COOLDOWN_NANOS - Static variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Cooldown duration for skill recharge in nanoseconds.
    skillActive - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    True while a temporary skill buff is currently active.
    SkillBar - Class in component.scene2
    Displays a compact skill cooldown bar.
    SkillBar() - Constructor for class component.scene2.SkillBar
    Creates a new skill bar with red base and empty yellow charge.
    skillCooldownStartNanos - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Start timestamp for current cooldown cycle, or -1L when inactive.
    skillState - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Current skill availability state.
    SkillState - Enum Class in logic.gameLogic
    Skill availability states for character special abilities.
    SkillState() - Constructor for enum class logic.gameLogic.SkillState
     
    SpawnAttack - Interface in logic.interfaces
    Helper contract for classes that spawn projectile attacks into the active battle scene.
    spawnProjectile(BaseProjectileAttack) - Method in interface logic.interfaces.SpawnAttack
    Adds projectile to the active Scene2 instance.
    spawnRangedAttack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Subclass hook to spawn concrete ranged projectile attack.
    spawnRangedAttack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Spawns arrow projectile with slight vertical random spread.
    spawnRangedAttack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Spawns a burst of bubbles with varied scale/speed/range values.
    spawnRangedAttack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
    Spawns tarot projectile and applies card-specific effects before firing.
    specialAttackKey - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Key binding for skill usage.
    speed - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Projectile speed per update tick.
    speed - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Legacy movement speed constant (currently unused).
    sprite - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Render node attached to scene graph.
    sprite - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Main body sprite displayed in scene.
    spriteLoader(int) - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Loads portrait sprite by index with fallback support.
    stage - Static variable in class application.SceneHandler
    Shared primary stage instance set during initialization.
    start(Stage) - Method in class application.Main
    JavaFX lifecycle method invoked after application launch.
    startAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
    Initializes hybrid attack animation state.
    startAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.MeleeClass
    Initializes melee attack animation state.
    startAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Initializes ranged attack animation state.
    startAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Barista
    No explicit attack animation start behavior for this character.
    startAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Exorcist does not use frame-based start animation here.
    startAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Delegates to ranged base start behavior.
    startAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Starts Bubble attack by setting strike state and blower timer.
    startAttack(Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
    Delegates start behavior to ranged base class.
    startAttack(Player) - Method in interface logic.interfaces.AttackAnimation
    Initializes attack animation state for a new attack cycle.
    startGameLoop() - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Starts the per-frame game loop.
    startSkillCooldown() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Starts/restarts skill cooldown timer and transitions skill state back to usable when done.
    state - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Current player action state.
    stopBGM() - Static method in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Stops currently playing background music, if any.
    switchRoot(Parent) - Static method in class application.SceneHandler
    Replaces current scene root with a new root and forces immediate layout pass.
